description: A student needs help in their 'Calculus I' course and wants to schedule a session at the tutoring center.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and the course they need help with.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student's identity and the course is 'MATH150 - Calculus I'.

nodes.task_description: Check the tutoring center's schedule for available 'Calculus I' tutors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds available time slots with a qualified math tutor.

nodes.task_description: Book a 1-hour tutoring session for the student and send them a confirmation email.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully schedules the appointment and confirms with the student.
